---
title: "Calculating statistical significance for PBMC suppression assay data"
output: html_document
date: "2025-08-14"
# written by: "Melissa Braschel"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Load required packages
library(readxl)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(writexl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(broom.mixed)
# library(rstatix)


```



```{r}

# 1. Load and prepare data

data <- read_excel("C:/Users/ye.shen/Downloads/Copy of For Discussion 2025-08-14.xlsx",
                   sheet = "Raw data")

data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    Pt_ID = factor(Pt_ID),
    Cell  = factor(Cell, levels = c("Treg", "Tconv")),
    Ratio = factor(Ratio, levels = c("1to2.5", "1to5", "1to10",
                                     "1to20", "1to40", "1to80"))
  )


# 2. Paired t-tests with Sidak correction

pairwise_results <- data %>%
  group_by(Ratio) %>%
  rstatix::t_test(CD80 ~ Cell, paired = TRUE, detailed = TRUE) %>%
  ungroup()

# Sample sizes per group
group_sizes <- data %>%
  group_by(Ratio, Cell) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Cell, values_from = n)

pairwise_results <- pairwise_results %>%
  left_join(group_sizes, by = "Ratio")

# Sidak correction
m_total <- nrow(pairwise_results)
sidak_adjust <- function(p, m) 1 - (1 - p)^m
alpha <- 0.05
alpha_sid <- 1 - (1 - alpha)^(1 / m_total)

pairwise_results <- pairwise_results %>%
  mutate(
    p.adj.sidak  = sidak_adjust(p, m_total),
    t_crit_raw   = qt(1 - alpha/2, df),
    se           = (conf.high - estimate) / t_crit_raw,
    t_crit_sidak = qt(1 - alpha_sid/2, df),
    conf.low.adj  = estimate - t_crit_sidak * se,
    conf.high.adj = estimate + t_crit_sidak * se,
    estimate        = sprintf("%.2f", estimate),
    se              = sprintf("%.2f", se),
    conf.low        = sprintf("%.2f", conf.low),
    conf.high       = sprintf("%.2f", conf.high),
    conf.low.adj    = sprintf("%.2f", conf.low.adj),
    conf.high.adj   = sprintf("%.2f", conf.high.adj),
    statistic       = sprintf("%.2f", statistic),
    p       = ifelse(p < 0.0001, "<0.0001", sprintf("%.4f", p)),
    p.adj.sidak = ifelse(p.adj.sidak < 0.0001, "<0.0001", sprintf("%.4f", p.adj.sidak))
  ) %>%
  select(Ratio, group1, group2, n1, n2, statistic, df,
         estimate, se, p, conf.low, conf.high,
         p.adj.sidak, conf.low.adj, conf.high.adj)

paired_ttest_results <- pairwise_results


# 3. Simple mixed-effects model (random intercept only)

mod_simple <- lmer(CD80 ~ Cell * Ratio + (1 | Pt_ID), data = data)
emm_simple <- emmeans(mod_simple, ~ Cell | Ratio)
pw_simple <- contrast(emm_simple, method = "pairwise", adjust = "none")

m_contrasts_simple <- nrow(as.data.frame(pw_simple))
alpha_sid_simple <- 1 - (1 - alpha)^(1 / m_contrasts_simple)

mixed_simple_results <- as.data.frame(pw_simple) %>%
  mutate(
    t_crit_orig   = qt(1 - alpha/2, df),
    conf.low.orig  = estimate - t_crit_orig * SE,
    conf.high.orig = estimate + t_crit_orig * SE,
    t_crit_sidak  = qt(1 - alpha_sid_simple/2, df),
    conf.low.adj  = estimate - t_crit_sidak * SE,
    conf.high.adj = estimate + t_crit_sidak * SE,
    p.adj.sidak   = 1 - (1 - p.value)^m_contrasts_simple,
    p.value     = ifelse(p.value < 0.0001, "<0.0001", sprintf("%.4f", p.value)),
    p.adj.sidak = ifelse(p.adj.sidak < 0.0001, "<0.0001", sprintf("%.4f", p.adj.sidak)),
    estimate       = sprintf("%.2f", estimate),
    SE             = sprintf("%.2f", SE),
    conf.low.orig  = sprintf("%.2f", conf.low.orig),
    conf.high.orig = sprintf("%.2f", conf.high.orig),
    conf.low.adj   = sprintf("%.2f", conf.low.adj),
    conf.high.adj  = sprintf("%.2f", conf.high.adj)
  ) %>%
  select(contrast, Ratio, estimate, SE, df,
         p.value, conf.low.orig, conf.high.orig,
         p.adj.sidak, conf.low.adj, conf.high.adj)


# 4. Complex mixed-effects model (random slopes)

mod_complex <- lmer(CD80 ~ Cell * Ratio + (1 + Cell + Ratio | Pt_ID), data = data)
emm_complex <- emmeans(mod_complex, ~ Cell | Ratio)
pw_complex <- contrast(emm_complex, method = "pairwise", adjust = "none")

m_contrasts_complex <- nrow(as.data.frame(pw_complex))
alpha_sid_complex <- 1 - (1 - alpha)^(1 / m_contrasts_complex)

mixed_complex_results <- as.data.frame(pw_complex) %>%
  mutate(
    t_crit_orig   = qt(1 - alpha/2, df),
    conf.low.orig  = estimate - t_crit_orig * SE,
    conf.high.orig = estimate + t_crit_orig * SE,
    t_crit_sidak  = qt(1 - alpha_sid_complex/2, df),
    conf.low.adj  = estimate - t_crit_sidak * SE,
    conf.high.adj = estimate + t_crit_sidak * SE,
    p.adj.sidak   = 1 - (1 - p.value)^m_contrasts_complex,
    p.value     = ifelse(p.value < 0.0001, "<0.0001", sprintf("%.4f", p.value)),
    p.adj.sidak = ifelse(p.adj.sidak < 0.0001, "<0.0001", sprintf("%.4f", p.adj.sidak)),
    estimate       = sprintf("%.2f", estimate),
    SE             = sprintf("%.2f", SE),
    conf.low.orig  = sprintf("%.2f", conf.low.orig),
    conf.high.orig = sprintf("%.2f", conf.high.orig),
    conf.low.adj   = sprintf("%.2f", conf.low.adj),
    conf.high.adj  = sprintf("%.2f", conf.high.adj)
  ) %>%
  select(contrast, Ratio, estimate, SE, df,
         p.value, conf.low.orig, conf.high.orig,
         p.adj.sidak, conf.low.adj, conf.high.adj)


# 5. Export only the paired t-test and simple mixed results to Excel, as the complex mixed model shows singularity

output_file <- "C:/Users/ye.shen/Downloads/analysis_results_2models.xlsx"

writexl::write_xlsx(
  list(
    paired_ttests = paired_ttest_results,
    mixed_simple  = mixed_simple_results
  ),
  path = output_file
)

```
